underlying_goal: Maintain and improve Claude instruction files (learn web best practices, optimize them) and build/rebuild a C++ hyperscan test target in the dataplane project
friction_detail: Initial file writes were denied by permission mode requiring a retry, and a formatter hook repeatedly reverted the dlp.am edit needed for the build.
brief_summary: User wanted to update Claude rules and build a hyperscan test target; Claude diagnosed a hook-reverted Makefile include and successfully built both binaries after permission and formatter obstacles.
